name: ManageEngine Log360 Cloud
description: ManageEngine Log360 Cloud SIEM for centralized log management, threat detection, and compliance monitoring

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Log360 Cloud instance
2. Connect your Zoho account when prompted
3. Grant read access to accounts, log sources, search, and log fields

Note: If your Log360 Cloud instance is on a non-.com domain (e.g. .eu, .in, .com.au), let us know so we can configure the correct regional endpoint.

checks.name: SIEM Availability
checks.description: Verifies Log360 Cloud SIEM is accessible and the connection is valid

checks.name: Log Source Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that log sources are configured and actively collecting logs in Log360 Cloud

checks.name: Log Source Organization
checks.description: Verifies that log sources are organized into groups for structured monitoring
